issue.title: v.youku.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMzkyNTM1OTEy.html?s=cc0053ea962411de83b1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fv.youku.com%2Fv_show%2Fid_XMzkyNTM1OTEy.html%3Fs%3Dcc0053ea962411de83b1) ### Comment > Easylist China can skip the video ad 100% almost immediately. In contrast, Adguard Chinese requires a 1-second wait, after which the audio portion of the ad begins playing (with no video visible, sometimes there's also no audio), while a normal "loading" screen remains displayed. I haven't tested exactly how long this loading screen lasts, but it is presumed to persist for the entire ad duration. Moreover, Adguard Chinese sometimes successfully bypasses the ad, but other times it fails. ``` Username: @janson403 ``` ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://jkanime.net/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fjkanime.net%2F) ### Comment > No bloquea los anuncios "On click", las páginas ahora superponen los links maliciosos o con anuncios en los botones, si bien lo filtra al abrirlo y lo bloquea, no soluciona el problema inicial que es que varias páginas cuando detectan bloqueadores de anuncios reemplazan los botones por estos tipos de redireccionamientos agresivos. Sucede siempre al abrir el navegador y buscar la página la primera vez, luego de recargarla, los botones vuelven a sus href originales. DESTACO: En Brave con la extensión, esto no ocurría hasta la actualización de filtros que volvió prácticamente inutilizable esa basura de navegador, Firefox, mi navegador actual el único tipo de anuncios con los que me encuentro son de este tipo, el <a href (...)> cambiado. ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://billbill.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbillbill.com%2F) ### Comment > #概述 > 此问题由“拦截 ETag 和 If - None - Match 标头”功能造成，关闭后恢复正常。 > > ##已造成的问题（**以复现成功率，从高到低排序**） > 1. 非AD营销界面无法加载，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 2. 其他用户的个人空间无法加载。 > 3. 视频/直播加载失败，或相关功能（如评论、点赞）不可用，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 4. 视频刷新失败。 > 5. 主页加载失败。 > > ###附注 > 1. 已尝试使用AdGuard DNS 私人服务器，并对本地与服务器过滤日志进行审查。除部分域名被错误屏蔽外（*正式测试与审查前已加入白名单*），未发现过滤器问题。 > 2. 以下议题可能与此问题有关: > -#229486. > -#229490. > --AdGuardTeam/AdGuardDNS#1023 ``` Username: @Tayg2048 ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

labels.name: A: Problematic

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: I've added rules in case you still have it. However, you should use `advanced protection`.

comment.body:
Not reproduced on my end.

Please try following actions, then check the problem again:
1. Leave only AdGuard filters
2. Disable all content blockers in Safari settings and enable them again
3. Restart Safari
4. Restart AdGuard
5. Check for filters update in AdGuard.

### Important:
<!-- **AdGuard for iOS** -->
* Do not close AdGuard window ~60 seconds, because iOS will break configuration process.
<!-- **AdGuard for Safari** -->
* The filters update process is fully completed ~10 seconds after the manual filter update check is completed.

issue.title: sarahsvegankitchen.com

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: sarahsvegankitchen.com

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).
